extDescription.message: Bilingual or replacement page translation using any OpenAI-compatible API.

cmdToggleMode.message: Switch between bilingual and replace mode

cacheHint.message: Translations are cached locally to avoid re-sending identical text. Clearing frees storage and forces fresh translations.

siteRulesHint.message: Per-site overrides. Auto-translate applies on load; blacklisted sites are never translated.

siteRulesEmpty.message: No site rules yet. Toggle “Auto-translate this site” in the popup, or add one here.

optionsSubtitle.message: Connect an API and choose translation defaults.

apiBaseHint.message: Both connection routes use the OpenAI V1 protocol.

apiKeyDirectHint.message: Required for a direct API connection.

apiKeyProxyHint.message: Optional when the proxy manages upstream credentials.

connectionModeDirectHint.message: The extension sends requests directly to your API. An API key is required.

connectionModeProxyHint.message: Uses the Dual Read proxy in this repository. It defaults to this device; replace the API base URL with its remote address when needed. An API key is optional unless the proxy requires one.

customHeadersHint.message: Optional headers sent with every API request. They stay on this device. API key Authorization takes precedence.

customHeadersEmpty.message: No custom headers yet. Click “Add header” to create one.

customHeadersInvalid.message: Please check header names and values. Names must be unique and filled when a value is set.

maxConcurrentHint.message: Default 3. Higher values finish long pages faster but may trigger API rate limits or timeouts.

batchSizeHint.message: Default 6. Smaller batches return faster; larger batches save API calls but increase the risk of malformed JSON responses.

presetDualReadHint.message: Uses your local server. Base URL should end with /v1. API key is usually optional.

presetDeepSeekHint.message: Direct DeepSeek API. Requires an API key.

presetOpenAIHint.message: OpenAI or any compatible /v1 endpoint. Requires an API key.

presetOllamaHint.message: Local Ollama OpenAI-compatible API. Key usually optional.

presetCustomHint.message: Enter any OpenAI-compatible base URL manually.

connV1Fixed.message: Updated URL to include /v1. Test again.

connConfigRequired.message: Add an API base URL and key.

connPermissionRequired.message: Browser permission for this API host was denied.

connModelNotFound.message: Model not found or endpoint path is wrong.

connMalformed.message: Got a response, but it was not usable.

connMissingV1.message: This looks like a server root. Add /v1 to the API base URL.

connNetworkError.message: Could not reach the API. Check the URL and that the server is running.

errPermissionRequired.message: Browser permission for this API host was denied.

errModelNotFound.message: Model not found or endpoint path is wrong.

errMalformed.message: Got a response, but it was not usable.

errPageRestricted.message: This page type cannot be translated (browser-restricted).

errPageUnsupported.message: This page is not available for translation.

errActionOpenSetup.message: Open setup to connect an API.

errActionGrantPermission.message: Allow access to the API host, then retry.

errActionUseHttps.message: Switch the API base to HTTPS.

errActionCheckKey.message: Check your API key in Options.

errActionCheckModel.message: Check the model name and /v1 path.

errActionWaitRetry.message: Wait a moment, then retry from the popup.

errActionFixV1.message: Add /v1 to the API base URL.

statusSiteDisabled.message: This site is disabled in Dual Read

onboardingSubtitle.message: Three short steps to your first bilingual page.

onboardStep1Hint.message: Direct API and Dual Read Proxy use the same OpenAI V1 protocol. Page text is sent only to the endpoint you configure.

onboardPathServerDesc.message: Best for privacy and shared cache. Runs on your machine. API key usually optional.

onboardPathDirectDesc.message: Text goes to your configured cloud or self-hosted model. Requires an API key.

onboardPathLaterDesc.message: Browse the options later. Translation stays disabled until you connect.

onboardStep2Hint.message: Fill in the endpoint, then run a tiny test translation.

onboardPrivacy1.message: Visible page text you translate is sent to the API base above.

onboardPrivacy2.message: Your API key stays in this browser. Extension storage is not encrypted.

onboardPrivacy3.message: Dual Read does not operate a translation cloud of its own.

rememberApiKey.message: Remember API key on this device

rememberApiKeyHint.message: Uncheck to keep the key only for this browser session.

sectionReadingHint.message: Choose interface and translation defaults for new pages. Site rules can override translation defaults.

sectionDataHint.message: Translated text goes only to your configured API. API keys and custom headers stay on this device; non-secret preferences may sync with your browser account.

advancedReadingHint.message: Leave defaults unless you hit rate limits or timeouts.

siteRulesHintCards.message: Use one exact hostname per rule. Auto-translate asks for site access when you save; never translate takes precedence.

confirmClearCache.message: Clear all cached translations on this device?

confirmExportSecrets.message: This export includes your API key. Save it only somewhere private. Continue?

connectionNotConfiguredHint.message: Add your API details, then test and save the connection before translating.

uiLocaleHint.message: This changes extension pages and in-page controls. The browser controls the extension name shown in its own UI.

targetLanguageHint.message: This is the language translated page text will use; it does not change the extension interface.

translationModeHint.message: Bilingual keeps the original and adds a translation. Replace hides the original until you restore it.

siteHostHint.message: Use one exact hostname, such as example.com. Paths, ports, and wildcards are not supported.

errApiBaseInvalid.message: Enter a valid API base URL.

errSiteHostRequired.message: Enter a hostname for every site rule.

errSiteHostInvalid.message: Use an exact hostname without a path, port, or wildcard.

errSiteHostDuplicate.message: Each site rule needs a different hostname.

errSchedulingRange.message: Enter a whole number from $1 to $2.

sitePermissionDenied.message: Site access was not granted, so auto-translate was not enabled.

privacyTextDestination.message: Visible page text is sent only to the API endpoint you configure.

privacySecretsLocal.message: API keys and custom HTTP headers stay on this device and are not browser-synced.

privacyNoCloud.message: Dual Read does not operate a translation cloud of its own.

includeCustomHeaders.message: Include custom HTTP headers in export

exportPrivacyHint.message: API keys and custom headers can grant access to your provider. They are excluded unless you explicitly include them.

confirmExportCustomHeaders.message: This export includes custom HTTP headers, which may contain credentials. Save it only somewhere private. Continue?

importPreviewSummary.message: Only the listed values will change. Private values that are not listed stay on this device.

confirmImportOverwrite.message: Import the listed settings? Existing private values that are absent from the file will stay unchanged.

sitePolicyPopupHint.message: Auto-translate needs permission for this site.
